coreMetrics.name: Pipeline Value
coreMetrics.description: Total weighted value of all active deals across pipeline stages — your leading indicator of future revenue

coreMetrics.name: Close Rate
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of qualified opportunities that convert to closed-won deals

coreMetrics.name: Average Deal Size
coreMetrics.description: Mean revenue per closed deal — track to ensure you're not drifting downmarket

coreMetrics.name: Sales Cycle Length
coreMetrics.description: Average days from first qualified meeting to closed-won — shorter is better but not at the cost of quality

coreMetrics.name: Customer Acquisition Cost
coreMetrics.description: Fully loaded cost to acquire one customer including marketing, sales salaries, tools, and commissions

weeklyRhythm.activity: Pipeline review — walk every active deal, update stages, identify stuck deals, confirm next actions for top 5 opportunities
Deal coaching — review call recordings or prep for upcoming high-value meetings, refine objection handling, sharpen positioning
Forecast update — update weekly forecast numbers, flag deals at risk, confirm commit vs best-case pipeline

monthlyRhythm.deliverable: Full pipeline health report with stage-by-stage conversion rates, aging analysis, and velocity metrics
Win/loss analysis for all closed-lost deals with root causes, competitor mentions, and pattern identification
Updated ideal customer profile based on recent wins, losses, and market feedback — adjust targeting criteria
Next month's revenue forecast, updated quotas, and target account list with outreach plan

whatToDelegate.when: Immediately — this should never be founder work beyond initial setup
whatToDelegate.toWhom: Sales ops, VA, or automate entirely

whatToDelegate.when: Once you have a clear ICP and qualification criteria documented (BANT or MEDDIC framework)
Once you have 3+ proposal templates that cover your common deal types
When deal volume exceeds 5 contracts per month
whatToDelegate.toWhom: Legal counsel or ops lead with legal training
